message:
fix: OSVersion returns actual OS version string, not GOOS/GOARCH (GAP-6.02)

Use uname -rs (darwin/linux) or cmd /c ver (windows) to return a real
version string like "Darwin 25.2.0" instead of "darwin/arm64". Falls
back to the old GOOS/GOARCH format if the command fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
